mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exit_record ORDER BY actual_exit DESC

SELECT * FROM exit_record
AND (driver_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR plate_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR driver_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%'))
ORDER BY actual_exit DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE exit_record SET spot_no = #{spotNo}, driver_no = #{driverNo}, driver_name = #{driverName}, driver_phone = #{driverPhone}, plate_number = #{plateNumber}, total_fee = #{totalFee}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, entry_time = #{entryTime}, actual_exit = #{actualExit}, parked_days = #{parkedDays}, updatetime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
